description: Contact Frontend Consistency — Avatars, Owner Title, Confidence. (1) Default avatars are Unsplash stranger photos — replace with initials-based generated avatar (F-09). (2) Owner title hardcoded 'Account Executive' — map from owner.role like lead detail (F-16). (3) Confidence hardcoded 0.85 for churnRisk and nextBestAction — use API data (F-17). (4) quietPeriodAlert always null (F-22). (5) ContactForm duplicated between create and edit (F-24). Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §16.
notes: Contact audit finding: F-09,F-16,F-17,F-22,F-24. See docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md
